description: Renovate config for WannaBuild. Pairs with .github/dependabot.yml as a secondary policy enforcer. The key control here is `minimumReleaseAge: 5 days`, which prevents dependency upgrades less than five days old from being merged. Most compromised package versions on npm/PyPI/etc. are detected and yanked within hours; a five-day cool-off therefore mitigates the most common supply-chain attack class while still allowing security updates to flow immediately via the `vulnerabilityAlerts` override.
